emails.subject: Re: Changed an EOL trade
emails.body: Re: Changed an EOL trade I just talked to Chris about this. Apparently, the Reliant trader thought he was clicking an SP-15 trade, and called immediately afterward to ask Chris if it could be adjusted. It was more lucrative for Chris to do this deal at SP-15 than NP-15 anyway, so he agreed. I guess I'm unclear about the exact EOL guidelines in a situation like this, but please let me know if there's anyone you'd like me to talk to. Chris didn't have the trader's name offhand, but I could probably get him to research it a bit more. Just let me know what you need from us. Thanks, Kate From: Kimberly Allen on 04/05/2001 10:43 AM CDT Sent by: Kimberly Indelicato

emails.subject: Changed an EOL trade
emails.body: Changed an EOL trade Kate, #562373 was an EOL trade that Chris Mallory did. When it was done on line the delivery point was NP-15 now in Enpower it has been changed to SP-15. Could you check with Chris if this is correct. I thought that we were not allowed to change EOL trades. If he did then I will have to get with Legal to find out what our next step would be. Thanks, Kimberly
